scripts.test: pnpm test:node && vp test run --config vite.test.config.ts
scripts.check: ROOT="$(cd .. && pwd -P)" && vp check src 'e2e/*.ts' 'e2e/vrt/*.ts' vite.config.ts vite.app.config.ts vite.test.config.ts vite.node.config.ts playwright.config.ts && cargo run --quiet --manifest-path "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" -p vize -- lint --max-warnings 0
scripts.check:fix: vp check --fix src 'e2e/*.ts' 'e2e/vrt/*.ts' vite.config.ts vite.app.config.ts vite.test.config.ts vite.node.config.ts playwright.config.ts
scripts.build:wasm: ROOT="$(cd .. && pwd -P)" && cargo build --manifest-path "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" --release -p vize_vitrine --no-default-features --features wasm --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && wasm-bindgen "$ROOT/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/vize_vitrine.wasm" --out-dir "$ROOT/playground/src/wasm" --target web
